scope: PROYA Lane A public example: source-backed visual annotation and evidence-card field extraction
external_use_boundary: Raw PROYA crops and screenshots are internal evidence basis only.
Customer-facing pages must use source-safe crop, redraw, masking, or neutral annotation.
PROYA, Guardian, CBE, and source publishers are public examples only, not VULCA customers, partners, endorsers, or authorization sources.
This ledger does not judge claim accuracy, rights ownership, public-release state, or legal/platform status.

local_assets.recommended_internal_use: deep proof source map, Page 8 evidence-card crop, decompose candidate
local_assets.recommended_customer_use: redrawn or masked public-example visual only

source_candidates.source_type: public social post by Proya Cosmetics
supports: No Skin Drama, Just PROYA campaign at Guardian Malaysia
Advanced Original Repair Series campaign context
source_candidates.use_limit: Use as campaign/source context only; do not reuse performance or ranking language in customer-facing copy.

supports: Original Repair Range, Double Effect Brightening Range, Advanced Firming Nourishing Range
Guardian Health and Beauty Malaysia / Livingstone Healthcare market-channel context
source_candidates.use_limit: Use as market/context source. Do not convert article wording into VULCA-validated product efficacy.

supports: 30th CBE China Beauty Expo participation context
source_candidates.use_limit: Use as event/source context only; do not make ranking, efficacy, or organizer-validation claims.

supports: possible PDP/source-record field for PROYA Original Repair product family
source_candidates.use_limit: Needs manual/browser confirmation before customer-facing use.

generated_internal_artifacts.role: full-frame annotation map for internal review
Page 8 candidate crop annotation for evidence-card fields

visual_annotations.label: Claim text / campaign surface
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: Visible PROYA campaign text and claim-like creative surface.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: Record the visible campaign line as a source item, not as a judged finding.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: May become a source-safe claim/source text cue in Page 8.

visual_annotations.label: Product representation / packshot
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: Product family, display units, packshot, and campaign display are visible together.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: Separate product representation from campaign wording and channel context.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: Use a masked/redrawn packshot-family region, not raw retail crop.

visual_annotations.label: Retail / Guardian channel context
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: Guardian retail signage and store/display context are visible.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: This cue supports channel/source context, not a relationship or authorization claim.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: Use as channel-context chip after source note is attached.

visual_annotations.label: Promotion / reuse cue
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: Promotion / prize / event-style copy appears near the campaign surface.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: Promotion-like visual language should carry source and owner routing before cross-channel reuse.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: Prefer generic redraw; do not expose raw promotion mechanics externally.

visual_annotations.label: People / likeness sensitive area
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: A large human/model image appears in the campaign display.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: This is a review-routing cue only; no rights conclusion is made.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: Remove, mask, or redraw for customer-facing use unless explicitly cleared.

visual_annotations.label: Owner route trigger
visual_annotations.observed_visual_cue: Product/PDP-like lower display region combines product, retailer, and source context.
visual_annotations.internal_interpretation: Route unresolved questions to brand, ecommerce/PDP, channel, and release owners.
visual_annotations.customer_treatment: Represent as an owner-route diagram rather than raw crop.

evidence_card_draft.title: Product-truth source trail for a public campaign display

claim.value: Visible PROYA campaign/product language is identified as a source item.

source.value: Campaign/source candidates identified; exact downloaded-image source and capture timestamp still need final recording.

representation.value: Retail display combines product family, packshot, channel context, and campaign creative.

owner.value: Brand, ecommerce/PDP, retail/channel, or release owner receives unresolved source/reuse questions.

does_not_claim: PROYA or Guardian is a VULCA customer, partner, endorser, or authorization source.
VULCA confirms claim truth, rights ownership, legal or platform status, or release approval.
The public example has a defect or problem.
next_action: Run or attempt source image decompose.
Convert raw crop into source-safe customer visual treatment.
Upgrade Page 8 with a worked evidence-card example only after human review.
